sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (region TEXT, product TEXT, amount INT);
SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_sales, GROUPING(region) AS is_grouped FROM sales GROUP BY ROLLUP(region);
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount + 50 WHERE region = 'North';
SELECT product, COUNT(*) AS product_count, GROUPING(product) AS is_grouped FROM sales GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((product), ());
